login.title: Lowani muakaunti
login.errorDefault: Kulowa kwalephera. Chonde onani zambiri zanu.
login.socialLoginError: Kulowa pa malo ochezera kwalephera. Yesaninso.

register.title: Lembetsani
register.passwordTooShort: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala ndi zilembo zosachepera 6.
register.registerSuccess: Akaunti yanu yapangidwa bwino! Mukutumizidwa ku tsamba lolowera...

forgotPassword.title: Ndayiwala mawu anga achinsinsi.
forgotPassword.description: Lowetsani imelo yanu ndipo tidzakutumizirani ulalo wokonzanso mawu achinsinsi.
forgotPassword.successDescription: Ulalo wokonzanso mawu achinsinsi watumizidwa ku imelo yanu. Chonde onani bokosi lanu.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: Pachitika cholakwika. Chonde onani imelo yanu.

resetPassword.title: Konzani Mawu Achinsinsi Atsopano
resetPassword.description: Konzani mawu achinsinsi atsopano a akaunti yanu.
resetPassword.successDescription: Mawu anu achinsinsi asinthidwa bwino. Mutha kulowa ndi mawu anu achinsinsi atsopano.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: Ulalo wokonzanso mawu achinsinsi ndi wosavomerezeka kapena wosakwanira. Chonde onaninso ulalo womwe uli mu imelo yanu.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Mawu achinsinsi ayenera kukhala ndi zilembo zosachepera 6.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Kubwezeretsa mawu achinsinsi kwalephera. Kulumikizanako kungakhale kosavomerezeka kapena kutha ntchito.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.accountInfo: Chidule cha akaunti yanu chili pansipa.
dashboard.fetchError: Panali cholakwika potsegula deta ya gululo.

myListings.title: Malonda anga
myListings.description: Konzani mndandanda wanu wonse kuchokera pano.
myListings.statusError: Panali cholakwika posintha momwe zinthu zilili.

deleteDialog.title: Chotsani malonda
deleteDialog.description: Mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuchotsa mndandanda uwu? Izi sizingasinthe.

messages.title: Mauthenga
messages.startConversation: Kuti mufunse funso lokhudza malonda, pitani ku malondawo.

updatePassword.title: Sinthani Mawu Achinsinsi
updatePassword.description: Sinthani mawu achinsinsi anu nthawi zonse kuti akaunti yanu ikhale yotetezeka.
updatePassword.passwordTooShort: Mawu achinsinsi atsopano ayenera kukhala ndi zilembo zosachepera 6.
updatePassword.errorDefault: Mawu achinsinsi sanathe kusinthidwa. Chonde onani mawu achinsinsi anu apano.

preferences.title: Chidziwitso ndi Zokonda Zowonera
preferences.description: Konzani njira zanu zodziwitsira ndi zokonda zowonetsera.
preferences.emailNotificationsDesc: Landirani zidziwitso za imelo za mauthenga atsopano ndi zosintha za malonda.
preferences.smsNotificationsDesc: Landirani mauthenga a SMS kuti mudziwe zambiri zofunika.
preferences.pushNotificationsDesc: Landirani zidziwitso zokakamiza kuti musinthe nthawi yomweyo.

hero.title: Nsanja Yogulitsira Zinyama Yamoyo
hero.subtitle: Nsanja yodalirika kwambiri yogulitsira nyama zamoyo. Gulani ndikugulitsa ng'ombe ndi nkhosa zanu mosamala.

secure.title: Kugula Motetezeka
secure.description: Malonda onse ndi otetezeka. Zambiri za wogulitsa ndi wogula zatsimikiziridwa.

variety.title: Mitundu Yosiyanasiyana ya Zamalonda
variety.description: Ng'ombe, nkhosa, ndi zina zambiri. Pezani mosavuta nyama yomwe mukufuna.

support.title: Thandizo la maola 24 patsiku, masiku 7 pa sabata
support.description: Tili pano nthawi zonse kuti tikufunseni mafunso. Mzere wathu wothandizira ukugwira ntchito.

cta.title: Yambani Tsopano
cta.subtitle: Tengani malo anu pa pulatifomu pomwe ogulitsa ndi ogula zikwizikwi amakumana.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Kugulitsa Ziweto. Ufulu wonse ndi wotetezedwa.
footer.tagline: Nsanja yodalirika kwambiri yogulitsa nyama zamoyo ku Turkey.
footer.appleLoginComingSoon: Kulowa mu Apple kudzakhala kogwira ntchito posachedwa.

faq.title: Mafunso Ofunsidwa Kawirikawiri
faq.description: Mayankho a mafunso omwe mumafunsidwa kawirikawiri okhudza nsanja yathu.

about.title: Zambiri zaife
about.subtitle: Nsanja yodalirika kwambiri yogulitsa nyama zamoyo ku Turkey.

mission.title: Cholinga Chathu
mission.description: Mwa kusintha malonda a nyama zamoyo kukhala a pa intaneti, cholinga chathu ndikupanga mgwirizano wotetezeka, wowonekera bwino, komanso wogwira mtima pakati pa opanga ndi ogula.

vision.title: Masomphenya Athu
vision.description: Kukhala mtsogoleri pakusintha kwa digito mu gawo la ulimi ndikukhala nsanja yapadziko lonse lapansi yogulitsa nyama zamoyo.

trust.title: Kudalira
trust.description: Kuwonekera bwino ndi kudalirika ndizofunikira kwambiri pazochitika zonse.

quality.title: Ubwino
quality.description: Kusintha kosalekeza kuti tipereke ntchito yabwino kwambiri.

contact.title: Kulankhulana
contact.subtitle: Chonde titumizireni uthenga ngati muli ndi mafunso.

form.title: Tilembereni kalata
form.name: Dzina lanu
form.subject: Mutu
form.success: Uthenga wanu watumizidwa bwino. Tikuyankhani posachedwa.

acceptance.title: 1. Kuvomereza Malamulo
acceptance.content: Pogwiritsa ntchito tsamba lino, mukuvomereza malamulo otsatirawa ogwiritsira ntchito. Ngati simukugwirizana ndi malamulo awa, chonde musagwiritse ntchito tsamba lino.

services.title: 2. Ntchito
services.content: Kugulitsa Zinyama kumapereka njira yogulira ndi kugulitsa ziweto zamoyo. Zochita zonse pa nsanjayi ndi udindo wa wogwiritsa ntchito.

accounts.title: 3. Maakaunti a Ogwiritsa Ntchito
accounts.content: Muyenera kupereka mfundo zolondola komanso zatsopano kuti mupange akaunti. Chitetezo cha akaunti yanu ndi udindo wanu.

prohibited.title: 4. Zochita Zoletsedwa
prohibited.content: Malonda osokeretsa, nkhani zabodza, chinyengo, ndi zochita zosaloledwa ndizoletsedwa kotheratu.

liability.title: 5. Malire a Udindo
liability.content: Nsanjayi siili ndi udindo mwachindunji pa zochitika pakati pa ogwiritsa ntchito. Zochitika zonse zimachitika pakati pa magulu awiriwa.

changes.title: 6. Zosintha
changes.content: Malamulo ndi zikhalidwe izi zitha kusintha popanda kudziwitsa. Zosinthazi zidzayamba kugwira ntchito nthawi yomweyo zikangofalitsidwa.

collection.title: 1. Kusonkhanitsa Chidziwitso
collection.content: Mukatsegula akaunti, timasonkhanitsa zambiri zanu monga dzina lanu, imelo adilesi, ndi nambala yanu ya foni. Tikhozanso kusonkhanitsa zambiri zosadziwika zokhudza momwe mumagwiritsira ntchito tsamba lanu.

usage.title: 2. Kugwiritsa Ntchito Chidziwitso
usage.content: Zomwe timasonkhanitsa zimagwiritsidwa ntchito popereka mautumiki athu, kusamalira akaunti yanu, kuonetsetsa chitetezo, komanso kukupatsani zotsatsa zomwe zimakusangalatsani.

sharing.title: 3. Kugawana Chidziwitso
sharing.content: Zambiri zanu zachinsinsi sizigulitsidwa kapena kubwerekedwa kwa anthu ena. Zambiri zanu sizidzagawidwa kupatulapo pazifukwa zovomerezeka ndi lamulo.

security.title: 4. Chitetezo
security.content: Njira zotetezera zomwe zimagwiritsidwa ntchito m'makampani zilipo kuti ziteteze deta yanu.

cookies.title: 5. Ma cookie
cookies.content: Webusaiti yathu imagwiritsa ntchito ma cookies kuti iwonjezere zomwe ogwiritsa ntchito amagwiritsa ntchito. Mutha kusintha zomwe mumakonda pa ma cookies mu makonda a msakatuli wanu.

rights.title: 6. Ufulu Wanu
rights.content: Malinga ndi lamulo la Turkey Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK), muli ndi ufulu wopeza, kukonza, ndikuchotsa deta yanu.

products.title: Zogulitsa
products.showing: Chiwerengero cha zinthu {zonse} pakati pa {kuchokera} ndi {mpaka}.

shippingRates.description: Konzani ndalama zotumizira ndi njira zotumizira.

subscription.title: Mapulani Olembetsa
subscription.cancelConfirmTitle: Kodi mukutsimikiza kuti mukufuna kuletsa kulembetsa kwanu?
subscription.cancelConfirmDescription: Kulembetsa kwanu kudzakhalabe kogwira ntchito mpaka kumapeto kwa nthawiyo. Pambuyo pake, mudzasamutsidwira ku dongosolo laulere.
subscription.noSubscriptionDesc: Ndi dongosolo laulere, mutha kufalitsa mindandanda yokwana itatu. Sinthani dongosolo lanu kuti mupeze zambiri.
subscription.subscriptionExpired: Kulembetsa kwanu kwatha ntchito. Dinani kuti mukonzenso.
subscription.subscriptionCancelled: Kulembetsa kwanu kwathetsedwa. Kugwira ntchito mpaka nthawi yomaliza.

metadata.title: Kugulitsa Ziweto - Nsanja Yogulitsira Zinyama Zamoyo
metadata.description: Nsanja yodalirika kwambiri yogulitsira nyama zamoyo padziko lonse lapansi. Kugula ndi kugulitsa nyama motetezeka komanso mowonekera.

about.title: Zambiri zaife
about.description: Dziwani zambiri zokhudza malonda a ziweto. Nsanja yodalirika yogulitsa ziweto zamoyo.

contact.title: Kulankhulana
contact.description: Lumikizanani nafe. Gulu lothandizira makasitomala la Livestock Trading lili okonzeka kukuthandizani.

privacy.title: mfundo zazinsinsi
privacy.description: Ndondomeko yachinsinsi ya malonda a ziweto. Dziwani momwe deta yanu imatetezedwera.

products.title: Zogulitsa
products.description: Sakatulani mndandanda wa ziweto zamoyo. Malonda odalirika a ng'ombe, nkhosa, ndi zina zambiri.

sellers.title: Ogulitsa
sellers.description: Pezani ogulitsa ziweto odalirika. Mbiri ndi ndemanga zotsimikizika za ogulitsa ziweto.

transporters.title: onyamula katundu
transporters.description: Dziwani makampani oyendetsa nyama. Mayendedwe a nyama amoyo otetezeka komanso aukadaulo.

search.title: Sakani
search.description: Sakani pakati pa mndandanda wa nyama zamoyo. Kusaka kosavuta ndi njira zosefera ndi kusanja.

faq.title: Mafunso Ofunsidwa Kawirikawiri
faq.description: Mafunso ndi mayankho omwe amafunsidwa kawirikawiri okhudza malonda a ziweto.

productDetail.title: {mutu} - Zogulitsa
productDetail.description: Zogulitsa mu {title} - {city}. Dinani kuti mudziwe zambiri ndi zambiri zolumikizirana.

sellerDetail.title: {dzina} - Mbiri ya Wogulitsa
sellerDetail.description: Mbiri ya wogulitsa ya {name}. Ndemanga, mndandanda, ndi zambiri zolumikizirana.

transporterDetail.title: {dzina} - Mbiri ya Wonyamula
transporterDetail.description: Mbiri ya wonyamula katundu wa {name}. Malo ogwirira ntchito, ndemanga, ndi zambiri zolumikizirana.

boost.title: Limbikitsani
boost.noBoostsDesc: Gulani phukusi la boost kuti muwonetse zinthu zanu.
boost.availableOnMobile: Kugula zinthu kungachitike kudzera mu pulogalamu yam'manja
boost.listingLimitReached: Mwafika pa malire anu. Sinthani dongosolo lanu.

admin.title: Gulu Loyang'anira
admin.subscriptionPlansDescription: Konzani mapulani olembetsa, mitengo, ndi zinthu zina.
admin.boostPackagesDescription: Konzani ma phukusi a boost, mitengo, ndi makonda a nthawi.
admin.editPlanDescription: Sinthani tsatanetsatane wa dongosolo, mitengo, malire, ndi zinthu zina.
admin.editPackageDescription: Sinthani tsatanetsatane wa phukusi, mitengo, ndi makonda a boost.
admin.noPackages: Palibe ma phukusi a boost omwe apezeka.
